text.title: Continuous Discovery Habits Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying continuous discovery habits end-to-end.

step.name: pin-outcome
step.action: Validate movability (team can move it in 1 quarter); reject proxy metrics; lock outcome_id.
step.output: Pinned outcome with movability check passed.
step.decision-gate: If movability check fails, escalate to leadership for a new outcome before continuing.

step.name: sample-and-interview
step.action: Apply diversity gate (segment × recency × churn × plan-tier); schedule ≥1 interview/week into a protected calendar block.
step.decision-gate: If diversity gate fails, block scheduling until roster updates.

step.name: code-transcript
step.action: Label every quote as past_behavior / preference / speculation; emit verbatim + participant_id + date; route past_behavior quotes only to synthesizer.

step.name: synthesize-tree-diff
step.input: Coded quotes (since last run) + current OST
step.action: Run OST-synthesizer (opus) to emit a YAML-diff (no full-tree rewrites); require N≥5 quotes from ≥3 participants before introducing a theme.
step.decision-gate: If N<5 or <3 participants, do not introduce the theme — defer.

step.name: trio-decide-and-publish
step.action: Trio meeting reviews the diff, decides promote / park / kill; PM publishes the updated OST + weekly readout + roadmap-input delta.
step.output: Updated OST committed + weekly readout shipped.
step.decision-gate: If trio cannot reach decision, name the missing evidence and schedule one targeted interview before the next meeting.
